name: Invoke-Formatter

options.name: -Range
options.description: The range within which formatting should take place. The value of this parameter must be an array of four integers. These numbers must be greater than 0. The four integers represent the following four values in this order:

options.name: -ScriptDefinition
options.description: The text of the script to be formatted represented as a string. This is not a ScriptBlock object.

options.name: -Settings
options.description: A settings hashtable or a path to a PowerShell data file (`.psd1`) that contains the settings.

args.name: -ScriptDefinition
args.description: The text of the script to be formatted represented as a string. This is not a ScriptBlock object.

args.name: -Settings
args.description: A settings hashtable or a path to a PowerShell data file (`.psd1`) that contains the settings.
